utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: Needs physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical_health plan with cost, mental_health plan with cost, and a combined cost. Fully specified. 
- property_coverage: Needs home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides home_contents plan and cost. Fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: Needs travel insurance with costs. Plan provides base plan, add-on, and total cost. Fully specified. 
- additional_services: Needs any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists services but does not provide explicit costs for these enhancements; it only states they are integrated. Not fully specified per requirement of 'with costs.' 
- total_budget: Needs complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item listed in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings and return their ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) which matches primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan rated 9; HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health) which matches primary_health_coverage.mental_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan rated 8; PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home contents) which matches property_protection.home_content.PrimeHome Premium Coverage rated 6; LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan (base travel) corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan rated 9; Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on corresponds to travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage rated 10.
